summary:
MINISTRY EVENTS AND PERSONAL CALLING: Brandon recounts his recent attendance at the Branson prayer conference, mentioning interactions with Sister Billie, Lynn, and Pastor Tracy Harris, who led a tent meeting where attendees experienced divine manifestations. Brandon notes this was his first time speaking extensively to a large crowd. Following his return, Brandon feels a strong mandate to adopt a winner mentality and actively contend for his spiritual calling, comparing this to the biblical generation that successfully claimed the Promised Land. He emphasizes resilience, referencing God's message that He is deploying His closers to handle end-time pressures.

ECONOMIC PREDICTIONS AND WEALTH TRANSFER: Brandon details a vision of President Trump paddling a canoe near a waterfall, symbolizing efforts to delay the global economy from falling into a prophesied beast system of a one-world government. Brandon states that while a severe economic crisis is looming, a supernatural wealth transfer will occur first to finance ministries. He describes a vision of a shallow, transparent wave revealing gold, crypto, silver, and real estate, indicating a brief economic boom designed to fund global evangelism. He urges believers to reject poverty mindsets and emulate the expansive thinking of billionaires like Elon Musk.

GLOBAL EVENTS AND GEOPOLITICAL WARNINGS: Brandon discusses the acceleration of end-time events, citing September 23rd as a point of no return involving Israel and the division of nations. He notes a recent United Nations vote where most countries abandoned Israel, yet he reaffirms his commitment to praying for Jerusalem. Brandon highlights the persecution of Christians in China under Xi Jinping and a genocide against believers in Nigeria, calling for divine intervention against these governments and North Korean leader Kim Jong-un. He mentions an upcoming November 4th Supreme Court decision regarding tariffs and issues a warning concerning a hit list targeting figures like Donald Trump, Pam Bondi, Alex Jones, and Tucker Carlson.

CYBER THREATS AND NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon shifts his focus to imminent cyberattacks targeting critical infrastructure, specifically the power grids in Los Angeles, the Bay Area, Michigan, Silicon Valley, Chicago, and Taiwan. He warns of Trojan horse infiltrations orchestrated by foreign hackers, urging protective prayers over the Army Corps of Engineers, Homeland Security, and nuclear facilities, with a specific focus on Minnesota and Illinois. Additionally, Brandon predicts a rapid, pulse-like increase in global earthquakes, explicitly warning of a devastating earthquake slated to strike Japan soon.

CULTURAL INFLUENCE AND MEDIA: Brandon expresses disappointment in Mel Gibson's casting choices for the upcoming The Passion of the Christ sequel, specifically the decision not to rehire Jim Caviezel. Despite this, Brandon believes the film, anticipated for release around the fall of 2026 or 2027, will trigger a massive global revival. He emphasizes the need to engage with culture to bring millions to faith, reflecting on his own reading habits by recommending several short books by Kenneth E. Hagin, which his wife Diana purchased to keep their faith stirred.

GLOBAL REVIVAL AND DOMESTIC PROTECTION: Brandon issues declarations for international revival, calling for literal and spiritual rain over Australia and New Zealand to break droughts and spark a massive harvest of souls among the Aborigines, along with a resurgence of Hillsong-style worship. He foresees revivals in Ireland, South America, Canada, the UK, the Philippines, and Africa. Domestically, Brandon prays for a protective barrier around American educational institutions, college tailgate events, and public gatherings like the Macy's Thanksgiving Day Parade and Black Friday shopping, combatting the threat of mass shootings and terror attacks. He also notes hearing the phrase Civil War in a state between sleep and wakefulness, framing it as a warning.
rawData: [October 23, 2025]-[Praying over the economy]-[https://youtu.be/Rj3MzUel5OA]-[Well, good morning family. It's late night, almost early morning, but I thought I'd pray with you all for a little bit. We went to the Branson prayer conference and what a time we had. It was wonderful. How's my audio? Tell us in the comment section down below how the audio is. We're trying a new mic because it echoes a lot, so we're trying to make it so you can hear us better. Let us know; if it's bad, we can switch back. I can push one button and it'll go back to the old one. If you don't like it, let us know. But we went to the prayer conference in Branson and it was wonderful. I really enjoyed that with Sister Billie and the family and Lynn and so many other people. They came from all over the place and it was awesome to see everybody. At the tent meeting we prayed; it wasn't live, televised, or livestreamed. There were demonstrations and manifestations. Pastor Tracy Harris from Texarkana came and laid hands on everyone in the whole tent revival and the power of God was knocking people down. It was amazing to see people get so blessed. Then they had the fish fry, but I got to speak at that tent meeting and that was the first time I've ever spoken to that many people for that long. Usually I talk a little bit and I've done that several times, but this is the first time anyone has really handed me the mic and said 'go with it.' So it was a real blessing to be able to pray and do the things that the Lord allowed me to do during that service. I believe it went pretty well. How can you judge your own thing? I just go by what they all said, and they said it was good. So I'm thankful for it. But now we're home and I have an urgency in my spirit to pray for our economy, to keep praying against delays, coming against what I believe is the enemy trying to rear his head, trying to stop the blessing of what the Lord is wanting for this body. As I was driving around today, coming back into town and doing the things that the Lord wanted us to do, He said to me, 'Brandon, you're going to have to contend for what I've told you to do. Don't just lay down and say, "whatever will be, will be."' Like that song, 'Whatever will be, will be, Que sera, sera.' It's not like that. We have got to take our authority and we have got to start praying over what God has told us to do and not just sit there and say, 'Well, whatever will be, will be.' He said, 'Brandon, you're going to have to contend for it. You're going to have to fight for it, lay hold to it.' He said, 'Whenever I told the children of Israel to go and get the land, they had a choice. They could either say God is with us and who can be against us or have the attitude of a winner mentality, or you can shrink back and go, "well, we're the size of grasshoppers."' The first generation did that and they died in the wilderness. But God had to raise up a whole new generation of people to go and take the land for Him. And that's the kind of people that have the bulldog mentality that go after it like a dog on a bone and say, 'You know what? I'm fighting and contending for what's mine.' And the Lord told me, 'For what I've called you to do, everything that I have, it's not a victim mentality that gets you there. You have a victor mentality, a winner mentality, but a winner mentality contends. They fight for it; they say, "This is mine."' Do you understand what I'm saying? It has to be that: how bad do you want it in these end times with all the stuff that's going on around us. There's so much every single day, ladies and gentlemen. I just go, 'My goodness, this has been incredible.' Even look at what we stopped, I believe, with the Atlanta shooting. The guy went in saying he wanted to do something at the airport, had 27 shots and a firearm. He walked into the airport, but his family told on him and he was brought to justice by the police department there. Thank God that's an answer to prayer. That right there shows we're contending. We're fighting. We're saying, 'No, you're not going to do this to our airports.' Because bottom line, ladies and gentlemen, we wrestle not against flesh and blood; we're wrestling against principalities and powers and spiritual wickedness in high places. This was a principality working through a personality. But I believe as we are praying believers that come in agreement and intercede for our nation, we're stopping this stuff. Now, I believe there's a lot more to stop. But praying for our economy to turn around—there are so many people saying we're in a recession. There are so many people saying that it's worse than 2008, that it's going to get worse than that and go into the Great Depression. And I said, 'Not yet.' So that's why I wanted you to come on here and pray with me tonight to pray over our economy so that we have that window. Now, I know I've heard other people say they believe a great economic crisis worse than 2008 will come in the next year, but I believe in God for a supernatural wealth transfer for the body of Christ before all this starts to take place. I told you I saw President Trump treading the river. It was like Niagara Falls, and he was paddling as fast as he could because the boat was going to go over. But he was keeping the economy from going clear over by paddling in that canoe as fast as he could because he knew that it was just a matter of time and it was going over. It's going into the beast system. That's where all this is headed. We all know that a one-world government, a one-world financial system is coming because that's what the Bible says. And so if that's coming, we're not going to stop it. Can we delay it and give us more time? Yes. I believe with our prayers and as we intercede, we're the salt and the light of this world. I believe that God has given us the ability to change a lot of things through prayer—delaying things, doing things. But I'm going to tell you, we're running out of time. Jesus Christ is coming. Now, I heard another man this week say, 'We're so far away from all that. Don't worry, Jesus isn't coming right now.' I don't doubt that we have a lot to do, but I'm going to tell you this: the time clock is ticking and we are at the midnight hour. I'm telling you, it's time to wake up. And that's why I've tried to warn you over and over, even at the prayer conference, trying to warn the people that a major shaking is about to take place in this earth to awaken it. It's not just about America. President Trump said today, 'Well, we have over 17 trillion dollars worth of stuff coming in.' I don't know where he's getting his numbers, but I pray that's true. I want an economic boom. I told you I saw the wave and it was transparent. You could see crypto, gold, silver, and the housing market through this. That means it was shallow. It wasn't a deep, defined wave, but it was a wave. Nevertheless, that's the word I would use. On top of the soil was gold. Do you all remember that? And the Lord said, 'There's enough gold on the layer of what's coming right here.' It was thin—not a thick foundation, but a thin one. He said, 'Enough to line your pockets, son. Fill your pockets as quickly as you can for what's about to come because it's not thick, it's thin.' And that wave will not last very long. It's a short-lived wave, but it will provide enough for an end-time wealth transfer for you to get the job done to bring in the harvest. It's not going to be long-lived, but it will give you enough time and enough money to get the job done. Jesus Christ is coming, and I'm telling you, brush arbor Churches, Woodstock Church—it's like Woodstock, Holy Ghost Woodstock. All this is coming; it's right at our door. But I've tried to tell some of the people, I said, 'We've got to have the money to get it done.' It costs millions and millions, if not hundreds of millions and tens of millions of dollars to get the gospel out. It's not free: TV time, radio time, all those kinds of things. The only thing that is free is these YouTubes; they've provided a platform for us to use that we can broadcast like this, and we get thousands of people watching on here, and it doesn't cost anyone anything. They just click on their internet provider and watch us on their phone or their tablet. Most people watch from their tablet or from their television, and some on phones. Which is it most, Braden? Phone and TV. I think it's pretty cool. And that's not TV time. We're using their platform, but they can turn us off anytime they want to. It's their platform. That's the part that's shaky. The moment we say something against what they believe or what they think, you're done. But I believe that persecution is not here yet to the point of where I believe it's coming. I told you it would be like an olive press in the days ahead, and the oil will come forth. Great persecution is coming on the church. And the Lord told me, 'The great harvest will come out of birthing pains. It will come out of a time of trials because people are not awake. People are not alert. They're not looking for the coming of the Lord Jesus Christ.' Many people are just like, 'I've heard it so much I don't believe it anymore, really.' There's a remnant of us who do, and those are the ones I believe are coming on here praying every single time we start prayer, and you're excited about it. Hey, this is a cool book: In Him by Kenneth E. Hagin. It's a little short read; it's 32 pages. I bet it's less than a dollar. You probably can get it for like 25 or 50 cents, I don't know, whatever. But it's a good read: In Him by Kenneth E. Hagin. Little short book, 32 pages. Pretty cool, huh? I like stuff like that; it's like a little pocketbook. Diana found that for me. I told her, 'Thanks, baby.' She got that and said, 'Hey, Brandon, I think you need to read this: In Him.' I have some more over there. Braden, will you get those other two little books mama got me over there? If Diana was here, she could read this to you in less than five minutes. She's a fast reader. Oh, she got me this one: The Precious Blood of Jesus by Kenneth E. Hagin. And then she got me The Gifts of Prophecy by Kenneth E. Hagin. And then she got me Praying to Get Results by Kenneth Hagin. They're all short reads. She gets me things that don't overwhelm me because I don't like to read that much anyway. But it has 71 pages in that one. So, it's a pretty cool little book she got me. It came in the mail; she got it from Amazon, I guess. She surprised me and said, 'Hey, I got that for you tonight. Look what I got you, Braden—Brandon.' So I'll share with Brent, my son. He can read one, and I'll read one a day. It keeps you stirred up. You have to fan that flame. You cannot let your flame go down in these last days. You have to stir yourself up. And that's what I'm trying to tell you. This is how I do it. This is how Diana does it. She'll read one of these little books, she'll drive around and say, 'Let's read that,' finding things to keep yourself stirred up in these last days. Don't wait on your pastor to feed you. Don't wait on the evangelist to feed you. Don't wait on a prophet to feed you. Don't wait on YouTube to feed you. You have to be a scavenger. How badly do you want your life to change? How desperate are you to find stuff? That's why we're always looking for stuff. My goodness, if I waited on my pastors to feed me only, you would die spiritually. Do you understand? You can't wait on people. You have to be a contender. The Lord said, 'Brandon, I'm putting my closers in.' He said, 'I've saved the best for last—my closers.' Diana and I started doing research on the closers; they are built for pressure. Closers in baseball—the ones that close the baseball game—are built for pressure. They don't lose the lead because they're not going, 'Oh gosh.' You know about buck fever when you're hunters and you're out there and your hands are shaking from the pressure of the buck walking in front of you. You miss the shot because you've got buck fever. That's where we are in these end times. God made us for pressure. He said, 'Brandon, we've got this, but you've got to be a contender. You can't just sit there and lay down on the job and say, "Stop."' Nobody feels sorry for you. That's what the Lord said. Nobody feels sorry for you. Do you understand? You've got to play the world's smallest violin for yourself? 'You had a hard day. The enemy was attacking.' Stand up and fight. Be a contender. Say, 'No, I'm not going to let you do this. I'm not going to let you rob my family of finances. I'm not going to let you rob me of health. I'm not going to sit here and have a snotty nose and have all this going on with me. I refuse to do this. I have a covenant with God.' You either are or you aren't. Are you a believing believer or not? Are we believing believers in these last days or are we not? That's why I started saying, 'I'm done with this.' When you say you're barely getting by, or you're done not feeling good... 'Oh, you're overweight.' Well, you eat too much. I work on myself daily. 'Well, you feel sorry for yourself.' No, you're the one that put the food in there. You've got one hole; you don't have to keep putting food in it all day long. The Lord gets on me about a lot of stuff. I walk a very tightrope with the Father. He's instructed me on what I'm supposed to be doing with my life, telling me, 'This is how you get there.' He always said, 'Brandon, if you want change in your life, you're going to have to change the way you're doing things because you can't keep doing the same thing expecting different results. How badly do you want to go on with me? How badly do you want this?' You want impartation from these generals? You want impartation, but are you a contender for it? Do you do what they did to get it—from Billy Burke to Lynne Hammond to whoever you know has been in ministry for 50 or 60 years? Do you do what they did to get where they are? They've sustained it and they've been there. Or do you just sit there and go, "Well, you know, there's a reason why there's not very many of them." Nobody said it would be easy, but how bad do you want it? And that's why I thought about it. You know, there's only one Bill Gates. There's only one Warren Buffett. There's only one Elon Musk. I'm just talking about the wealthiest of the wealthiest. But they did something. And I'm not saying they did righteous things to get there, but I'm talking about people who contend for the greater wealth. It's a pattern. They have a different mindset. They think differently. They don't think poverty. They don't think quit. They don't think loser. They think winner. It's like when they say you could retire and never have to work again, "Elon, you're worth $500 million. You're the richest person in the world. Why do you keep working?" I was thinking, why? Why would you? You're never going to spend all that if you just had it by yourself. That's an absurd amount of money. He's almost halfway to a trillion dollars. Do you realize that's a lot money? That's rich. But yet you just have that drive to keep going. You're just built differently. What does it take to be in ministry for 50 years like my friends? Not a victim. Not somebody who's always whining about their life and about demonic attacks. That's why I checked myself. You're not a victim, Brandon. A victim's not going to make it. Whiners, don't be a whiner. Be a winner. That's what he said, Brandon. You're not going to do this and be a whiner. You're built for pressure. I said you were closers. I'm putting in my closers. So, every single one of you that are watching right now, I believe that God has called you for such a time as this. And he didn't build you to fail. He did not build you to be a whiner, but a winner. How bad do you want it in your life? I want change. And that's what I thought. All the times whenever it came down to working for minimum wage, working for barely getting by, and you work your tail end off by the sweat of your brow all day long for those eight hours a day, Monday through Friday, and you go get another job. You've got two jobs, you're working it, and you never make it. I've always read these books and I listen and I study about these people who have been successful. They have an idea to solve a problem. It's the problem solvers. It's creative. It's never the grunts. Well, I worked for this guy and I flipped burgers for him and I filled soda—I was a soda jerk or whatever. I worked at the convenience store. But it's always solving a problem. It's thinking outside of the box for ministry. How do we get more people saved? That runs through my mind all the time. How do we get more people saved for the kingdom of God? What we're doing is not working, is it? You get a hundred people saved. Is that working? When there's 8 billion plus that are dying and going to hell, is a hundred effective? The numbers aren't good enough. It needs to be millions. When there's eight billion, we need millions at a time, tens of millions to even be effective at all to be able to say, "Hey, you did something." But when you get a hundred, I'm so grateful for the hundred, but I'm trying to think bigger. How do I get there? How do you do that? I don't see anybody around me, even in my circle, that is even getting—I even say, "Do you even get an altar call? How many people did you get saved in the last year?" It is less than probably a thousand and they've been in ministry for 50 years. How many people did you get born again this year? Well, you know we got 500, 5,000. That's a fail. I don't care. You can't brag about that. I can't brag about that. There's 8 billion people going to hell and they're dying by the tens of thousands every couple of minutes. I don't even know the statistics of it. The mathematical equation of it is too big for my mind to comprehend. How many are being born? How many are dying? But how many of those people went to hell? Hell is enlarging its gates every second. People are dying. And I don't want to get excited and relax at a hundred souls. I'm thankful, but I see too many people slipping through the fingers. And I thought, how do you become more effective? And the only thing I can ever relate it to is what drew me: the anointing. It's the anointing. It's the anointing that breaks the yoke. Approximately 150,000 to 173,000 die a day. Did you show them that? I don't know how many other people—like I said, I don't see even in some churches that we don't even have altar calls that often. Maybe we get one a month, or if that, because there's no new converts coming. And if that's the case, that's what the Lord told me. He said there has to be a great—so I'm saying all that to say this today. The reason why I know—I don't just believe, I'm fully persuaded in what God has told me is coming: a great shaking to awaken, to draw the people up, to draw the people in. Yes, there's a great falling away. But the Lord said to me, "Brandon, I'm leaving the 99 and going after the one." But there will be a 24-hour period where everything will change. A great shaking to awaken is coming. Now, people ask, "When?" I don't know. But he told me as of the 23rd of September, this was the point of no return. And a great acceleration would begin at the 23rd involving the fig tree, the nations, the sheep and the goat nations. You would see a dividing line. Just like what happened—they took a vote at the UN. There were only three nations that stood by the state of Israel. The rest of the world turned their back and said no. They even walked out on Benjamin and his whole speech. So it's all about the fig tree. Do I stand with everything that Israel stands for? I always stand with Israel, but I don't always have to agree with some of the government decisions. It's like America. I pray for America and I live here, but I don't always agree with America's decisions. But I always stand with the people of Jerusalem. I always pray for the peace of Jerusalem. You have to separate politics from what God said. It's so much bigger than all that. Do I agree with everything Trump's doing? I don't know; I don't have time to pay attention to everything Trump's doing. But for what he's doing, he's trying to save our economy. He's trying to do these things. Do I think he's doing everything right? Probably not. But he's doing the best he can, I'm sure. Could I do any better? Heavens no. I'm trying to do a YouTube channel. But to run a country that is almost $40 trillion in the hole? What else do you do with a sinking ship? It's the Titanic. It's going down. There's no saving it, period. I don't care who you are and how much you prophesy; there's nothing going to save it. You know why? Because it's in the way. It's in the way of bringing in the beast system. It will not be saved. It will not stop. This is part of the end times. Jesus Christ is coming, and it doesn't matter how much we try. Jesus is coming. Thank God. Aren't you ready? But right now, the biggest thing we can do is pray for our government. Pray for our leaders; pray for President Trump to have wisdom on how to bring it. We need that wave. We need this wave for the rocket fuel to get the job done so we can get out of here. But I just know it's going to cost money. At the same time, the church can't. Most people are going, 'Man, we've got to make the budget for the meeting. How much is the budget?' A couple hundred thousand. Wow. That's not that much compared to everything. Even if it's half a million dollars compared to what Elon Musk and some of the jokers in the world have—they're worth billions—the body of Christ is bleeding for half a million dollars for a meeting budget so we can get the gospel out. Then people show up and say, 'Well, you know, we're excited if we get the offering and we make the budget.' We've got to think bigger. The Lord said, 'Brandon, you've got to think bigger. Do you understand the comprehension of—say, for instance, this meeting that I just went to? There were probably less than 3,000 to 4,000 people there. It was a lot of work. But we're believing for billions to come to Jesus. We had 3,000 to 4,000 people there, and it was a lot of work. That's what I'm trying to tell you all. It's time to be a contender as the pressure of the end times gets closer. It's time to expand your believing so that we reach these lost people. They're going to hell. When I saw the Asians come, and they are always so tender and loving, they say, 'Thank you, Brandon, for starting a China channel. I try so hard to tell my relatives about it. They're in China.' I lived in China. They are so excited about it because they don't get to hear the gospel. Did you see the crackdown in China against the Christians? They're throwing them in prison and doing all this stuff. They're persecuting the church in China right now on a great scale. It's all in the news. The church in China is being persecuted now because they don't want them talking. They don't want any church, so they're throwing them in prison. The Lord told us it was coming, but I know what He said about a revival. I just want you all—this is just me talking tonight—to think bigger. We must. Is that the article, son? It was all over Xi Jinping. The Chinese government was putting their people in prison. I saw it. I think I took a screenshot when I was on the way because I was shocked. I was like, 'Oh my goodness, it's happening.' I just want you to believe bigger with me. I'm so thankful for what God has given me—don't get me wrong—but I'm always asking Him to enlarge me inside, to think bigger. Not just to get a couple hundred, but tens of thousands, tens of millions, to believe for the billion-flow so that we can get the gospel out. Because, as I told Max, the Lord said to me, 'Brandon, I'm waiting on one thing right now. I'm waiting on the ones in the backfield. You get them and bring them in. You keep doing this, and I'll come to get you.' That's the last thing He has. That's what He's been talking to me about: 'Brandon, bring in the lost—the ones that are dying, hurting, and broken. Bring them in, and I'll come and get you.' So, I'm a thinker. Diana goes, 'What are you doing?' I'm always quiet; I'm in the car, I just stare up and look over. I'm listening. I listen again. I said, 'How can you hear God if you're always flapping your mouth? Be still. Listen. He's talking. Show me, grow me, teach me.' I want to know, Father. You have it, but I've got to tap into that vein—praying in the spirit, listening, stirring yourself up to get that. The only thing I always come back to is the anointing. It's the anointing. It's revival. It's a shaking to awaken. It's the plague. I believe the fall of 2027 is what I'm praying over. Don't quote me on that. 'Oh, Brandon, you missed it.' I hear in part and see in part. If I see something and it doesn't come to pass, I did my best. I'm praying into it. I never professed to be a prophet; I never have. I tell you I'm a watchman. But I want to tell you, I'm praying over Mel Gibson. He didn't pick Jim Caviezel. I was really disappointed in that. We interceded for that quite a bit. I don't know who this guy from Spain is that he hired for 'The Passion of the Christ' movie, but it's kind of a letdown to me because I really like Jim Caviezel. I was like, 'No, what'd you do that for?' We need him to stick to the Bible. The Lord told us to pray for Mel Gibson. So why didn't he hire Jim Caviezel? I don't know. He already started filming on that movie. One of the things I want to say is that that movie will be used for what I have seen as a major revival in the days ahead. I don't know how long it will take him to get it out or when the movie will come out—probably in 2026, maybe the fall of 2026—but I know it will be a major tool to bring in the lost, and the Lord said to pray for him. So we continue to pray for him and for the protection of President Trump. The Lord warned us about praying over Pam Bondi, Alex Jones, and Tucker Carlson. I saw the list and every one of them had their names on it. I went over that; it made me very nervous to talk about. Needless to say, what I was seeing was very serious. If anybody watched that livestream, it was very intense. That was the last video on Sunday night. Does anybody have questions about that at all? Did anybody watch what the Lord was warning about concerning the hit list? We're praying over these things, praying for the MS-13 to be exposed and the rats to be exposed. All the things the enemy tried to do in secret will be opened and exposed in the name of Jesus. We're praying over our president, the decisions he makes, and the days ahead. For November 4th, the Supreme Court is supposed to have their final decision on the tariffs. There is major stuff coming. The Supreme Court is supposed to make their decision if they say he can't put the tariffs on there. I mean, about the medication, bringing it home—there's so much there. So, we'll pray real quick. Are you going to take communion with me? We can pray for a little bit here. I know it's probably really late where you are, but I'm here. If you want to pray with me, fine; if not, go to sleep. You can watch it tomorrow. How many are here? 3,500. Father, I just thank you for the body that was broken for us. Lord, I thank you that you teach us to be more effective, that we bring in the lost and it's not just one soul at a time. Father, the harvest is plentiful, but the laborers are few. Teach us to be more effective in our harvesting. Lord, if the harvest is plentiful and the laborers are few, and there's just a little bit of us bringing them in, teach us to be better at harvesting; anoint us to be better at harvesting tonight. When we speak, Father, it's not us talking, but it's Christ in us, the hope of glory. Jesus Christ is the same yesterday, today, and forever. As He is, so are we in this world. If Jesus were here today, how would He do it? If he was walking this earth right now in human form, I know; as he is, so are we. But I'm saying if he was really like it was 2,000 years ago, how would he do it now in a modern day? How would he use YouTube? I know he'd probably use TV, but how can we be more effective? And the only thing that I can ever say is the anointing breaks the yoke. It's the anointing; it's the anointing that gets the job done. And we have to die. It's the refiner's fire.
